creator: salojan@goto10.co
text:
Created attachment 157897
gdb core output

Firefox crashes when downloading two (or more) mpeg videos (and possible others), and opening one of them with VLC while another one is still downloading.

To reproduce:

Start downloading small and large mpeg videos.
When small completes, open it with VLC while large still downloads.
Firefox crashes immediately when VLC opens the file.
